2605.14747.title: Video2GUI: Synthesizing Large-Scale Interaction Trajectories for Generalized GUI Agent Pretraining
2605.14747.paper_summary: Recent advances in multimodal large language models have driven growing interest in graphical user interface (GUI) agents, yet their generalization remains constrained by the scarcity of large-scale training data spanning diverse real-world applications. Existing datasets rely heavily on costly manual annotations and are typically confined to narrow domains. To address this challenge, we propose Video2GUI, a fully automated framework that extracts grounded GUI interaction trajectories directly from unlabeled Internet videos. Video2GUI employs a coarse-to-fine filtering strategy to identify high-quality GUI tutorial videos and convert them into structured agent trajectories. Applying this pipeline to 500 million video metadata entries, we construct WildGUI, a large-scale dataset containing 12 million interaction trajectories spanning over 1,500 applications and websites. Pre-training Qwen2.5-VL and Mimo-VL on WildGUI yields consistent improvements of 5-20% across multiple GUI grounding and action benchmarks, matching or surpassing state-of-the-art performance. We will release both the WildGUI dataset and the Video2GUI pipeline to support future research of GUI agents.
2605.14747.paper_summary_zh: 最近在多模態大型語言模型方面的進展引發了對圖形用戶界面（GUI）代理的日益關注，但其泛化能力仍受到缺乏涵蓋多樣化現實世界應用的大規模訓練數據的限制。現有數據集在很大程度上依賴於昂貴的手動標註，且通常限於狹窄的領域。為了解決這一挑戰，我們提出了Video2GUI，這是一個完全自動化的框架，能夠直接從未標註的互聯網視頻中提取有根據的GUI互動軌跡。Video2GUI採用粗到細的過濾策略來識別高質量的GUI教程視頻，並將其轉換為結構化的代理軌跡。我們將這一流程應用於5億個視頻元數據條目，構建了WildGUI，這是一個包含1200萬個互動軌跡的大規模數據集，涵蓋超過1500個應用和網站。在WildGUI上預訓練Qwen2.5-VL和Mimo-VL在多個GUI定位和行動基準測試中均實現了5-20%的穩定改進，達到或超越了當前的最佳性能。我們將發布WildGUI數據集和Video2GUI流程，以支持未來的GUI代理研究。
2605.14747.author: Weimin Xiong et.al.
2605.14747.authors: Weimin Xiong, Shuhao Gu, Bowen Ye, Zihao Yue, Lei Li, Feifan Song, Sujian Li, Hao Tian
